item.title: I'm Just a Bill: American Cargo Preference Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — American Cargo Preference Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Cargo Preference Act modifications in the 119th Congress. Builds on existing cargo-preference law that requires a portion of federally-financed cargo to ship on U.S.-flag vessels.

What does it actually do?

  • Adjusts cargo-preference percentages for federally-financed shipments
  • Maritime workforce provisions
  • Domestic shipbuilding provisions
  • Composing with broader reshoring agenda

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #16 Brass Tacks (reshoring + domestic manufacturing supply chain). Maritime workforce capacity is structural infrastructure for Step 4 Node distributed manufacturing supply chains.
